findings.message: Missing conditional field: 'argument-hint' (relevant for this skill's configuration)
'description' should include 'Trigger with ...' phrase for user discoverability (marketplace)
Purpose statement is long (>400 chars) - keep it crisp
Consider imperative language instead of 'you should/can/will'
Tool 'Edit' is declared in allowed-tools but never referenced in the skill body — over-permissive or stale declaration
Tool 'Read' is declared in allowed-tools but never referenced in the skill body — over-permissive or stale declaration
External API surface referenced (curl/fetch/MCP/OAuth/etc.) but no authentication method documented — add an Auth section or reference auth.md
Consider adding 'model': Setting an explicit model prevents unexpected behavior when session model changes
Consider adding 'effort': Setting effort level optimizes reasoning for this skill's complexity
Uses $ARGUMENTS/$N but 'argument-hint' frontmatter is missing — add argument-hint for autocomplete support (per official docs)
Production gate ran 5 checks: allowed-tools accuracy, auth documented, dead code, tool safety, orchestration bounds
